meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding: The Beginner AI Builder Checklist
content.seo_description: Stop building dead-end apps. Learn to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code in this step-by-step developer guide.
content.answer_block: Most student projects fail because users abandon them instantly. By implementing a 'Value-First' onboarding flow—where users experience an 'Aha!' moment before signing up—you dramatically increase retention. Use Antigravity to scaffold your state machine and Claude Code to automate the integration of your user authentication and progress tracking.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks grinding out code, only to launch your app to a void of zero returning users. It is the classic 'Student Trap': building functional features without a narrative arc for the user. When your app feels like a cold, empty room, users leave before they ever see the value of your hard work.

But the gap between a 'basic app' and a 'SaaS product' isn't just more features—it’s the onboarding experience. By guiding your user through their first success, you turn a casual visitor into a loyal power user. It is time to stop writing code that sits on a shelf and start building systems that actually engage people.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that proves your app's value. We will map this to a simplified state machine to ensure the UI only shows what is necessary.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my app logic and suggest a 3-step 'Aha!' onboarding flow that leads the user to their first successful output without requiring immediate account creation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file onboarding_flow.md --task 'Generate the React components for a 3-step progress-based onboarding modal.'

steps.title: Build the Progressive Profile
steps.description: Stop asking for emails at the start. Collect data incrementally as the user interacts with your tool to reduce friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a progressive profile collector that stores user preferences in local storage before persisting to the database.

steps.title: Implement Interactive Tooltips
steps.description: Guide the user through your UI using context-aware tooltips. This prevents the 'blank slate' problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a lightweight tooltip component that triggers based on user inactivity or after the first successful action.

steps.title: Automate User State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure that if a user refreshes the page, they don't lose their progress in the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom React hook that synchronizes onboarding step state with URL parameters for deep-linking support.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file useOnboarding.ts --refactor 'Add URL parameter synchronization'

steps.title: Setup Post-Onboarding Trigger
steps.description: Once they finish the flow, trigger an automated email or notification to reinforce the value they just discovered.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a webhook service that sends a 'Congratulations' email via Resend once the user completes the onboarding state machine.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Integrate Resend API for post-onboarding welcome emails'

pro_tips: Never force a sign-up wall before the user experiences the core value; let them play with the tool first.
Use URL search parameters (e.g., ?onboarding=step2) to make your onboarding flow bookmarkable and debuggable.
Keep your onboarding flow under 30 seconds; if it takes longer, you are teaching, not helping.
Implement an 'Exit' button on your onboarding modals; users hate feeling trapped in a tutorial they didn't ask for.
Track the drop-off rate at each step of your onboarding flow using simple console logs or an analytics tool to find where users get confused.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding is live, deploy your app to Vercel and share the link in our community showcase to receive feedback on your flow.
content.conversion_block: You now have the blueprint to turn casual visitors into power users. It is time to stop guessing and start engineering growth into your product. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
